summary: Comprehensive testing completed for MVPLine messaging features. Backend: 11/11 API tests passed (100%). Frontend: All required features tested and working - Login, Inbox with MVP badges/colored rings, Message thread, Attachment menu (Photo/Video/Template/Reviews), Templates modal, Review Links modal, MVP AI suggestion panel, and Review Links settings page.
critical_code_review_comments: No data-testid attributes found on interactive elements - recommend adding for better test automation
Paperclip button click required coordinate-based clicking, consider adding data-testid='attach-button'
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_messages_review.py - Created comprehensive messages and review links tests
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing superadmin account
context_for_next_testing_agent: All messaging features working correctly. Tested: Login, Inbox display with MVP outcome badges and colored rings, Message thread view, Attachment menu with Photo/Video/Template/Reviews options, Templates modal with 5 predefined templates, Review Links modal showing 'No review links configured', MVP AI suggestion panel with Dismiss/Edit/Send buttons, More tab with Review Links option, and Review Links settings page.

login_flow.notes: Login with superadmin@mvpline.com / admin123 works correctly

inbox_mvp_outcomes.notes: Inbox displays MVP outcome badges (Call Back, Hot Lead, Help, Done) with colored rings around avatars

message_thread_view.notes: Thread shows messages correctly with timestamps

message_input_buttons.notes: Input area has paperclip (attach), mic (voice-to-text), sparkles (MVP AI), and send button

attachment_menu.notes: Clicking paperclip opens menu with Photo, Video, Template, Reviews options

templates_modal.notes: 5 predefined templates: Greeting, Follow Up, Appointment, Thank You, Review Request

review_links_modal.notes: Shows 'No review links configured' with 'Set Up Review Links' button

mvp_ai_suggestion.notes: Clicking sparkles shows AI suggestion panel with Dismiss/Edit/Send buttons

more_tab_review_links.notes: More tab has Review Links option under Features section

review_links_settings.notes: Review Links settings page shows Google, Facebook, Yelp, Trustpilot, Custom Link inputs

noted: Twilio SMS/MMS - messaging is mocked, not actually sent
OpenAI - AI suggestions are mocked with predefined responses
Google Calendar OAuth - calendar integration partially implemented
